column1: # Custom partition table for CYD Dashboard — 4 MB flash
# No OTA (saves 1.875 MB vs min_spiffs.csv's two 1.875 MB OTA slots).
# The freed space is given to SPIFFS so TTS MP3 files fit comfortably.
#   app0:   1.875 MB  (0x1F0000) — fits the ~1.4 MB firmware binary
#   spiffs: 2.000 MB  (0x200000) — fits 96 × ~12 KB TTS files (≈1.1 MB)
